user.title: Connect to your LuxPower dongle
user.description: Enter your dongle's connection details. In client mode Home Assistant dials the dongle; in server mode the dongle dials Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the dongle. Check the host, port and that it is reachable.
error.invalid_serial: The dongle and inverter serials must each be exactly 10 characters.

write_register.name: Write register
write_register.description: Writes a value to a single hold register on the inverter. Intended for advanced use, such as setting a register surfaced by discovery that is not yet exposed as an entity.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The Lumen dongle or inverter to write to.

read_register.name: Read register
read_register.description: Reads a single register on demand and returns its raw value, without waiting for the next poll.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The Lumen dongle or inverter to read from.

bank.name: Bank
bank.description: Which register bank to read: input (telemetry) or hold (settings).

discover_sweep.name: Discover registers
discover_sweep.description: Reads input and hold registers across a wide range so the discovery store learns about registers Lumen does not normally poll. Reads only; nothing is written. The Undecoded registers sensor updates with whatever is found.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The Lumen dongle or inverter to sweep.

input_end.name: Input end
input_end.description: Read input registers from 0 up to (but not including) this address.

hold_end.name: Hold end
hold_end.description: Read hold registers from 0 up to (but not including) this address.
